title: HeadStealPlus
description: High Quality All-In-One HeadSteal plugin with lots of features.
body:
![HeadSteal](https://i.imgur.com/CdN37NK.png)

# Plugin Overview:

HeadSteal is a plugin which enables players to eliminate player by killing them. Killing players will drop their head which you can use to revive them. With **HeadStealPlus** this concept has been enhanced by improving the quality and adding more features.  
Every single feature of **HeadStealPlus** is configurable!

# Features:

- Configurable Player Head Display Name & Lore.
- Configurable Messages.
- Revival Core. (A custom item used to revive any eliminated player, can only be obtained by its custom recipe which can be disabled in config, or by using admin command.)
- Custom Kill Message. (Can be disabled from config if you want.)
- Custom Revival Core GUI. (Currently only AnvilGUI is supported.)
- Configurable ban types. (Fully banned or Spectator)

# Commands:

- `/headstealplus revivalcore givecore <targetPlayer>`
- `/headstealplus reload`
- `/headstealplus help`

# Permissions:

- `headstealplus.reloadconfig`
- `headstealplus.givecore`

# Requirements:

- Java 17 or Higher.
- SkinsRestorer Plugin. (Soft Dependency)
